---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve OpenNews
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened instead.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment

- **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome 122, Firefox 124, Safari 17]
- **OS**: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Node.js version** (if running locally): [e.g. 18.19.0]
- **Deployment**: [Local dev / Self-hosted Vercel / Other]

## AI Model Status

- [ ] Bug occurs before AI model loads
- [ ] Bug occurs during/after AI model loads
- [ ] Bug is unrelated to AI features

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here. Include console errors if available (open browser DevTools > Console tab).
